description_long: This object is a medium-sized bird with a robust, upright posture and a rounded head. Its plumage is predominantly light brown and cream, with a mottled pattern that provides camouflage against tree bark. The bird has a short, hooked beak typical of nocturnal raptors, and its large, forward-facing eyes are set in a rounded facial disk. The legs are short and sturdy, with visible talons, and the tail is relatively short and rounded. The overall texture of the feathers appears soft and slightly fluffy, with subtle barring and speckling across the body.
description: A medium-sized, mottled brown and cream bird with a rounded head, short hooked beak, and soft, camouflaged plumage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's mottled plumage and the rounded outline of its head and body.
description_view_1: Three-quarter front view highlighting the facial disk, large eyes, and hooked beak.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's curved back and the pattern of its feathers.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the symmetrical facial disk, both eyes, and the short, rounded tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with irregular bars and spots, blending brown, cream, and white
